text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #1)
I installed the jail using ezjail today.
it seams the lib file is broken.

root@web:/usr/local/etc/apache24 # sha256 /lib/libthr.so.3 
SHA256 (/lib/libthr.so.3) = af98a5fc6ca61a16a621fda8473f0842ba31031c94244265d0efd6b7ea344edd

Thanks!
